name: N-able N-central RMM REST API
what_it_does: N-able N-central remote monitoring and management (RMM) REST API for managed service providers to automate endpoint monitoring, patch management, script execution, backup monitoring, and managed security across client environments — enabling AI agents to manage device health, automate patch compliance, and integrate with PSA platforms through N-able's MSP-focused RMM platform. Enables AI agents to manage device management for endpoint health status, inventory, and configuration monitoring automation, handle patch management for OS and third-party patch deployment and compliance tracking automation, access script execution for remote PowerShell and script execution and result retrieval automation, retrieve service management for Windows service and process monitoring and restart automation, manage notification management for alert policy configuration and threshold management automation, handle backup monitoring for backup job status and failure alert automation, access security management for AV status and managed EDR integration monitoring automation, retrieve customer management for MSP client organization and device group management automation, manage task automation for scheduled automation task creation and monitoring automation, and integrate N-able N-central with PSA platforms and ticketing for complete MSP RMM automation.
use_cases: Automating patch compliance reporting and patch deployment across MSP client endpoints for patch management agents
Monitoring endpoint health and automating remediation for managed service delivery agents
Integrating RMM device data with PSA ticketing for MSP service operations automation agents
Executing remote scripts on managed endpoints for IT automation agents
not_for: Enterprise IT without MSP model (N-able N-central is MSP-designed; enterprise IT uses Intune, SCCM, or Tanium)
Cloud workload monitoring (N-able N-central monitors traditional endpoints; cloud infrastructure uses cloud-native monitoring)
SIEM and security analytics (N-able provides basic security monitoring; enterprise SIEM uses Splunk, Sentinel, or dedicated platforms)
best_when: A managed service provider wanting AI agents to automate endpoint monitoring, patch management, script execution, and PSA integration across managed client environments through N-able N-central RMM.
avoid_when: MSP PARTNER AGREEMENT IS REQUIRED: N-able serves MSP partners; automated general-IT assumption creates partner_agreement_required for organizations without N-able MSP partnership; automated must be an N-able MSP partner. API IS N-CENTRAL SPECIFIC: N-able has two RMM products (N-central and RMM/Take Control); automated unified-API assumption creates endpoint_not_found for N-central API calls against N-able RMM product or vice versa; automated must use product-specific API for each N-able product. MULTI-TENANT REQUIRES CUSTOMER SCOPING: N-central multi-tenant structure requires customer (client) scoping for all device operations; automated global-query assumption creates cross_client_data for queries without proper customer scope; automated must always scope operations to correct customer. AUTOMATION POLICIES ARE SEPARATE FROM SCRIPTS: N-central script execution and automation policies are distinct features; automated script-equals-policy assumption creates execution_gap for automation use cases requiring policy-based scheduling vs. on-demand script execution; automated must distinguish on-demand script execution from policy-based automation.

auth.notes: N-able N-central uses API key and JWT for RMM REST API. REST API with JSON. Burlington, ON HQ (formerly SolarWinds MSP division). Spun off from SolarWinds 2021. NYSE:NABL. Revenue: $400M+ ARR. Products: N-central (enterprise RMM), N-able RMM (SMB), N-able EDR (by SentinelOne), N-able Mail Assure. 25,000+ MSP partners. 3M+ managed endpoints. Competes with ConnectWise, NinjaOne, and Kaseya for MSP RMM platforms.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No public free tier; MSP partner agreement required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-device monthly subscription; MSP pricing per managed endpoint; volume discounts
pricing.notes: Burlington ON. NYSE:NABL. $400M+ ARR. 25,000+ MSP partners. Per-device MSP pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API token; device query APIs throttled per partner agreement

known_agent_gotchas: JWT TOKEN REQUIRES REFRESH: N-central REST API uses JWT tokens with expiration; automated permanent-token assumption creates token_expired for long-running automation workflows not refreshing JWT before expiration; automated must implement JWT token refresh before expiry

CUSTOMER ID IS REQUIRED FOR DEVICE QUERIES: N-central device queries require customer ID for multi-tenant scoping; automated global-device assumption creates cross_customer_data for device queries without customer scope; automated must include customer ID for all client-scoped device operations

SCRIPT OUTPUT IS ASYNCHRONOUS: Remote script execution on N-central returns job ID; automated inline-result assumption creates missing_output for script results retrieved before execution completes; automated must poll script job status until completion before retrieving output

PATCH SCAN IS SEPARATE FROM DEPLOYMENT: N-central patch scanning and patch deployment are separate operations; automated scan-equals-deploy assumption creates unpatched_endpoint for workflows that scan for patches but don't explicitly trigger deployment; automated must initiate patch deployment after scan identifies missing patches

DEVICE STATUS IS CACHED: N-central device health status has refresh intervals; automated real-time-status assumption creates stale_health for device status checks relying on cached data; automated must trigger device status refresh or account for cache staleness in health monitoring
agent_readiness.security_notes: MSP RMM platform. SOC2, GDPR, ISO27001. API key + JWT. US/EU/CA. Managed endpoint and client infrastructure data.

security_score_components.security_notes: RMM. SOC2, GDPR. API key + JWT. US/EU/CA. MSP managed endpoint and client data.
